title: Input types
description: Use the right type — free UX and validation.

questions.prompt: For an email address, the best input type is:
questions.explanation: type="email" shows an email keyboard on mobile and validates the format.

questions.prompt: Which input type is best for a birthday?
questions.explanation: type="date" gives a native date picker.

questions.prompt: Which shows the numeric keypad on mobile AND allows decimals?
questions.code:
A) <input type="number">
B) <input type="tel">
C) <input inputmode="numeric">
D) <input inputmode="decimal">
questions.explanation: inputmode="decimal" — mobile shows numeric keyboard including '.' key.
type="color" gives a native picker; value is a hex string.

questions.prompt: For a search field with a clear-x on mobile:
questions.explanation: type="search" gets a subtle X clear button and better mobile UX.
type="range" with min, max, step attributes.
type="checkbox" — use the `checked` boolean attribute to preselect.

questions.prompt: For a hidden field (submitted but not visible):
